summary: Asset ID Format Feature - All tests PASS. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: Modal, preview, and dropdown with new format all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing devices (BERE01-01, BERC01-01, BERC02-01)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asset ID format feature fully implemented and tested. New format: [device_id]-[suffix]. Example: AAHC01-01-TAB. Suffixes: TAB, SCA, TDO, SDO, TPS, SPS, USB, LAN, 12V, KIT, OTH. Access portal via /portal/admin with admin@tsrid.com/admin123. Scanner app has PIN protection (9988 admin, 3842 user).

P0_asset_type_dropdown.details: Dropdown shows options with → suffix notation (e.g., 'TSRID Tablet → TAB')

P0_asset_id_preview.details: Modal shows real-time preview (e.g., BERE01-01-TAB) that updates when type changes

P1_modal_opens.details: Modal opens correctly via + Asset button with e.stopPropagation() fix working

metadata_endpoint.details: GET /api/asset-mgmt/metadata returns asset_type_suffix_map with all suffixes
